div.p:
Please use the Logout button to exit safely.
Pressing the back button may leave your admin session unsecured and expose the system to unauthorised access.
Add, edit, or remove system users

a.t-attf-class: btn btn-sm ta-project-chip js-ta-assignment-tab {{ 'btn-success ta-project-chip-active' if (assignment_filter or 'all') == 'all' else 'btn-outline-success' }}
btn btn-sm ta-project-chip js-ta-assignment-tab {{ 'btn-success ta-project-chip-active' if (assignment_filter or 'all') == 'assigned' else 'btn-outline-success' }}
btn btn-sm ta-project-chip js-ta-assignment-tab {{ 'btn-success ta-project-chip-active' if (assignment_filter or 'all') == 'unassigned' else 'btn-outline-success' }}

small.t-att-class: 'badge mt-1 ' + ('bg-danger' if ticket.sla_status == 'breached' else 'bg-warning text-dark' if ticket.sla_status == 'at_risk' else 'bg-success')

option.t-att-selected: 'selected' if ticket.assigned_to and ticket.assigned_to.id == u.id else None
'selected' if ticket.project_id and ticket.project_id.id == proj.id else None
'selected' if ticket.sla_policy_id and ticket.sla_policy_id.id == sla.id else None

tr.td: No tickets found for this filter.

small.t-att-class: 'badge ' + ('bg-danger' if ticket.sla_status == 'breached' else 'bg-warning text-dark' if ticket.sla_status == 'at_risk' else 'bg-success')

option.t-att-selected: 'selected' if ticket.assigned_to and ticket.assigned_to.id == u.id else None
'selected' if ticket.project_id and ticket.project_id.id == proj.id else None
'selected' if ticket.sla_policy_id and ticket.sla_policy_id.id == sla.id else None

div.div: No tickets found for this filter.

div.class: alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show mb-3
alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show mb-3

tr.td: No users found for this filter.

div.p: Are you sure you want to deactivate this user?

div.class: alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show mb-3

t.div: Project created. Click Manage on the project row to add team members and upload documents.

div.class: alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show mb-3
alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show mb-3

t.div: Project deleted. A closure report has been saved under Project Reports.

div.p: Manage SLA policies and ticket defaults
Upload documents for the AI chatbot to answer customer questions
View closure reports generated when projects are deleted

t.t-esc: (pj_conf.start_date.strftime('%b %Y') if pj_conf and pj_conf.start_date else '—') + ' → ' + (pj_conf.end_date.strftime('%b %Y') if pj_conf and pj_conf.end_date else '—')

div.label: System Name *
div.div: Shown in email notifications and the dashboard title.

div.label: Time Zone
div.div: Used for ticket timestamps and SLA deadline display.
Auto-assignment is now managed from the profile dropdown in the top-right header.

div.span: No team members yet. Add the first member above.

div.p: Drag & drop a file here, or click to browse
PDF, DOCX, TXT or XLSX — max 10 MB

div.span: No documents uploaded for this project yet.

div.p: Are you sure you want to delete ?
A closure report will be saved automatically before deletion. This action cannot be undone.

div.class: modal-footer border-0 pt-0 pb-4 d-flex gap-2 justify-content-center

div.p: Reports are automatically generated when a project is deleted. Each report captures ticket statistics, team composition, task completion, and SLA performance at the time of closure.

div.label: Link to Project (shows on ticket board)

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4 flex-wrap gap-3
card-header bg-white border-0 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center pt-3
card-header bg-white border-0 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center pt-3
